title: VillagerTradeEdit
description: Shopkeeper for Folia. Can trade and change professions
body:
VillagerTradeEdit

**VillagerTradeEdit** is a Minecraft plugin that empowers players with the necessary permissions to edit the trades of villagers in-game. Through an intuitive in-game UI, users can easily and efficiently customize any villager's trades to suit their needs.

This plugin provides similar functionality to the **Shopkeepers** plugin but stands out by allowing edits to any villager directly. Plus, it supports **Folia** for those who want enhanced compatibility.

> *"I just couldn't wait for Shopkeepers to support Folia, so... I made one myself. its quite rough don't expect much."*

## Features
- **Easy Villager Trade Editing**: Shift-right-click on a villager to start editing.
- **In-Game UI**: Modify trades directly in-game without any hassle.
- **Unlimited-Trade**: Create as much trade as you want.

![Input and Outputs Slot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0943259850ab7e7981b39c713ecdf1f6e7d57083.png)# 

## Dependencies
[Ysklib](https://github.com/YusakiDev/YskLib/releases/)

## Commands and Permissions

### Commands
- `/vte reload` — Reloads the plugin configuration file.
- `/vte summon` — Summons a static villager.

### Permissions
- `villagertradeedit.command` — Permission to use any command from the plugin.
- `villagertradeedit.open` — Permission to open the villager trade edit menu.
- `villagertradeedit.command.reload` — Permission to reload the plugin configuration file.
- `villagertradeedit.command.summon` — Permission to summon a static villager.

## Setup
1. **Download** the latest version of the **VillagerTradeEdit** plugin.
2. **Place** the downloaded `.jar` file into the `plugins` directory of your server files.
3. **Restart** your server to load the plugin.
